arts.ttl: Gary Neville agrees with Jamie Carragher in fresh Tottenham attack after Chelsea loss
arts.sum: Pundits were notably vocal with their criticism of Spurs' performance while Yves Bissouma and Pape Mata Sarr gave away two penalties in the second half. They’re absolutely ridiculous decisions, those challenges… It’s just reckless and really poor defending.

arts.ttl: Rangers go top of SWPL after Glasgow City draw
arts.sum: Rangers climb above Glasgow City to the top of the Scottish Women's Premier League with an assured victory over Motherwell, thanks to a first-half goal from top-scorer Katie Wilkinson.

arts.ttl: The lingering Celtic pain driving Callum McGregor towards Rangers redemption as serial winner is out for blood
arts.sum: The Celtic skipper insists he’ll never lose his hunger for silverware as he heads to Hampden on Sunday

arts.ttl: Spurs must believe in what Postecoglou is doing - Sutton
arts.sum: Chris Sutton discusses Ange Postecoglou's problems at Spurs and whether the 4-3 loss to Chelsea shows their style of play in unsustainable.

arts.ttl: Partick Stewart sent clear message over his first Rangers priority as arrival of 'new money' put on hold
arts.sum: The former Manchester United chief will start work with a packed in-tray

arts.ttl: Report: 'Exceptional' La Liga star is going to sign for Tottenham in January
Tottenham injury news for Rangers clash amid Van de Ven and Romero update
arts.sum: Cristian Romero, Brennan Johnson and Micky van de Ven were all forced off in defeat to Chelsea to take fitness concerns for Postecoglou into double figures. On his return to action after four weeks out with a hamstring injury, Micky van de Ven appeared to pick up a new muscular issue against Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou set for hostile Scotland return with injury-hit Spurs as key defenders wait to discover extent of long-term muscle problems
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Ange Postecoglou made his first return to Ibrox since leaving Celtic with a fire extinguisher to hand as Tottenham travel to Scotland in Thursday's Europa League clash.

arts.ttl: Ianis Hagi insider explains the REAL reason behind Rangers recall as loan target 'interest' heats up - Ibrox bulletin
arts.sum: Hagi has impressed since being reintroduced to the first team picture by Philippe Clement

arts.ttl: 'Hearing a reoccurrence of injury': Journalist says Tottenham star could now be out until the New Year
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are currently in the midst of an injury crisis that is affecting the club on the results front. Spurs haven’t won in four...
